description_long: This object is a pump-action shotgun featuring a robust black metal barrel and receiver, paired with a wooden stock and fore-end. The stock is full-sized, crafted from wood, and ergonomically shaped for shoulder support. The fore-end, also wooden, is ribbed for enhanced grip and is positioned beneath the barrel, indicating a pump-action mechanism. The barrel is relatively short, with a simple front sight and no visible ribbing or venting along its length. The trigger guard is rounded and proportionally sized, enclosing the trigger securely. Overall, the shotgun exhibits a utilitarian design typical of tactical or home-defense firearms, with a blend of wood and metal materials.
description: A pump-action shotgun with a black metal barrel and receiver, complemented by a wooden full stock and ribbed fore-end. The design is utilitarian, with a rounded trigger guard and a short, unadorned barrel.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full wooden stock, ribbed fore-end, and the entire length of the black barrel and receiver.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the circular muzzle, narrow barrel profile, and the ribbed fore-end directly beneath.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, displaying the wooden stock, ribbed fore-end, and black barrel.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the butt of the wooden stock and the alignment of the barrel and receiver.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, no visible ribbing or venting, short barrel length
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with smooth edges and no visible finger grooves or reinforcement
